title: RSOS Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: RSOS Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: RSOS Time Table 2026 is out for Secondary (Class 10) and Senior Secondary (Class 12) Mar-May exams. Rajasthan State Open School has released the complete theory and practical exam schedule from 23 April to 20 May 2026. Check subject-wise dates, exam timings, and PDF download details here.

content.text: Rajasthan State Open School has officially released the RSOS Time Table 2026 for Sr. Secondary (Class XII) and Secondary (Class X) Examinations Mar-May 2026. The theory examinations will be held from 23 April 2026 to 20 May 2026.

The complete RSOS Time Table 2026 is available on the official notification link at Click Here Students can also download their admit card from the official RSOS portal https://rsosadmission.rajasthan.gov.in using registration number or login credentials.

Students are advised to verify all dates, timings, and instructions carefully on the downloaded timetable. In case of any discrepancy, contact your study centre or the Rajasthan State Open School immediately.
Download the RSOS Time Table 2026 PDF here: Official RSOS Time Table 2026 PDF

The RSOS Time Table 2026 provides the complete schedule for theory and practical examinations of Secondary and Senior Secondary courses under the Rajasthan State Open School for the Mar-May 2026 session.

rows: Secondary (Class X) and Sr. Secondary (Class XII)

content.text: RSOS has published the detailed subject-wise RSOS Time Table 2026 for both Secondary (Class X) and Sr. Secondary (Class XII) examinations. The schedule includes subject codes, timings, and important notes for theory papers. Practical examinations for selected subjects will be conducted at designated centres during the same period.
Students must refer to the exact subject code and pattern while checking their dates. Below is the complete date-wise timetable.

sections.heading: How to Download RSOS Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the RSOS Time Table 2026 PDF directly from the official notification link. The process is quick and does not require any login.

items: Open your web browser and visit the official RSOS Time Table 2026 notification link.
The PDF document will load automatically in your browser window.
Locate the download icon or option in the PDF viewer toolbar.
Click to save the file on your device for easy access.
Open the saved PDF and print a clear copy for reference.

content.text: Check the official timetable thoroughly for your subject codes, timings, and exam instructions. Keep a printed or digital copy handy for effective exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in RSOS Time Table 2026

content.text: The official RSOS Time Table 2026 contains all essential information required for the Mar-May 2026 examinations. These details help students prepare confidently for both theory and practical papers.

items: Complete date-wise theory examination schedule for Class X and Class XII
Subject names with official codes for Secondary and Senior Secondary
Exact timing and duration of each paper
Practical examination period and list of subjects requiring practicals
Important notes and instructions for candidates
Admit card download guidelines from the official portal
Guidelines for photo ID and centre reporting
Mark-sheet and certificate distribution information
Clear statement that no change will be made in the examination dates

seo_tags: Rajasthan State Open School Time Table 2026
